title: Config ZTE OLT C6xx
text:

WDM (แนะนำIE)

Config ZTE OLT C6xx เขียนโดย Meru^^ วันพุธที่ 22 ธันวาคม  2021 เวลา 12:36 น. 1.##################Add Profile และ register onu C6XX################### 1.1********************การ Add profile upload ******************** gpon profile tcont UNLIMITED_UP type 4 maximum 1228800 profile tcont voip type 1 fixed 1536 profile tcont UNLIMITED_UP_Type3 type 3 assured 10240 maximum 819200 onu profile sip sipp42 registrar sipp42.totbb.net profile tcont VPN-10M-IN type 1 fixed 10240 profile tcont VPN-30M-IN type 1 fixed 36860 ! 1.2********************การ Add VLAN profile******************** gpon onu profile sip sipp41 proxy sipp41.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp41 registrar sipp41.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp42 proxy sipp42.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp42 registrar sipp42.totbb.net onu profile vlan internet tag-mode tag cvlan 10 onu profile vlan voip tag-mode tag cvlan 20 pri 7 ! ################### การ Register ONU ######################## 1.************************register onu C6XX************************ # show pon onu uncfg conf t (config)# interface gpon_olt-1/2/1 (config)# (config-if-gpon_olt-1/2/1)# onu 1 type ZTE-F680 sn ZTEG090009E2 vport-mode manual ! 2.********************Interface gpon(ทำงานฝั่ง OLT)************************ 2.1********************Internet************************ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name xxxxjxxxx vport-mode manual tcont 1 name internet profile UNLIMITED_UP gemport 1 name internet tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 10 2.2********************Voice************************ tcont 2 name voip profile voip gemport 2 name voip tcont 2 vport-map 1 2 vlan 20 $ 3********************Interface vport(ทำงานฝั่ง OLT)************************ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 10 vlan 3097 ********************Voice************************ service-port 2 user-vlan 20 vlan 1500 $ 4********************pon-onu-mng(ทำงานฝั่ง ONU)************************ 4.1********************Bridge************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service internet gemport 1 vlan 10 vlan port eth_0/1 mode tag vlan 10 dhcp-ip ethuni eth_0/1 from-internet $ 4.2********************Route************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service internet gemport 1 vlan 10 wan-ip 1 ipv4 mode pppoe username xxxxjxxxx@fttxhome password xxxxxxxx vlan-profile internet host 1 wan-ip ipv4 ping-response enable traceroute-response enable $ 4.3********************Voice************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service voice gemport 2 vlan 20 voip protocol sip voip-ip ipv4 mode dhcp vlan-profile voip host 2 voip-ip ipv4 ping-response enable traceroute-response enable sip-service pots_0/1 profile sipp41 userid 0xxxxxxxx username 0xxxxxxxx password 0xxxxxxxx display-name 0xxxxxxxx sip-service pots_0/2 profile sipp41 userid 0xxxxxxxx username 0xxxxxxxx password 0xxxxxxxx display-name 0xxxxxxxx $ 4.4********************VPN Route************************ (config)#gpon (config-gpon)#onu profile ip pe-wan-vlan303 ipv4 gateway 10.6.3.253 (config-gpon)#onu profile vlan vlan303 tag-mode tag cvlan 303 $ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name 7742x0001 PEA vport-mode manual tcont 1 name vpn profile VPN-30M-IN gemport 1 name vpn tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 303 $ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 303 vlan 303 $ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service vpn gemport 1 vlan 303 wan-ip 1 ipv4 mode static ip-profile pe-wan-vlan303 ip-address 10.6.3.254 mask 255.255.255.252 vlan-profile vlan303 host 1 $ 4.5********************Bridge Trunk************************ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name xxxxjxxxx vport-mode manual tcont 1 name internet profile UNLIMITED_UP gemport 1 name internet tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 28 vport-map 1 1 vlan 350 vport-map 1 1 vlan 352 $ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 28 vlan 28 service-port 2 user-vlan 10 vlan 350 service-port 3 user-vlan 30 vlan 352 $ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service mng gemport 1 vlan 28 service vpn gemport 1 vlan 10 service vpn1 gemport 1 vlan 30 vlan port eth_0/1 mode trunk vlan port eth_0/1 vlan 28,10,30 dhcp-ip ethuni eth_0/1 from-internet ### หลังจาก static IP WAN ลงไปที่ ONU ให้ไปปิด NAT ที่เมนู Network => Routing(IPv4) => NAT โดยเอาเครื่องหมายถูกออก 5********************Create ONU Type ONU)************************ pon onu-type ZTE-F220 gpon description 4GE,2POTS onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 pots_0/2 onu-type ZTE-F260A gpon description 1XGE,4GE,2POTS,WIFI onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A pots_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/6 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/7 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/8 onu-type ZTE-F2801S gpon description 1XGE onu-type-if ZTE-F2801S eth_0/1 onu-type ZTE-F2866S gpon description 1XGE,4GE,2POTS,WIFI onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S pots_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/6 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/7 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/8 onu-type ZTE-ESPORT gpon description 4GE,2POTS,WIFI max-iphost 4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/6 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/7 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/8 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT pots_0/2 แก้ไขล่าสุด ใน  วันพุธที่ 07 กันยายน  2022 เวลา 13:47 น. | Config ZTE OLT C6xx |  |  |  | เขียนโดย Meru^^ | วันพุธที่ 22 ธันวาคม  2021 เวลา 12:36 น. | 1.##################Add Profile และ register onu C6XX################### 1.1********************การ Add profile upload ******************** gpon profile tcont UNLIMITED_UP type 4 maximum 1228800 profile tcont voip type 1 fixed 1536 profile tcont UNLIMITED_UP_Type3 type 3 assured 10240 maximum 819200 onu profile sip sipp42 registrar sipp42.totbb.net profile tcont VPN-10M-IN type 1 fixed 10240 profile tcont VPN-30M-IN type 1 fixed 36860 ! 1.2********************การ Add VLAN profile******************** gpon onu profile sip sipp41 proxy sipp41.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp41 registrar sipp41.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp42 proxy sipp42.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp42 registrar sipp42.totbb.net onu profile vlan internet tag-mode tag cvlan 10 onu profile vlan voip tag-mode tag cvlan 20 pri 7 ! ################### การ Register ONU ######################## 1.************************register onu C6XX************************ # show pon onu uncfg conf t (config)# interface gpon_olt-1/2/1 (config)# (config-if-gpon_olt-1/2/1)# onu 1 type ZTE-F680 sn ZTEG090009E2 vport-mode manual ! 2.********************Interface gpon(ทำงานฝั่ง OLT)************************ 2.1********************Internet************************ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name xxxxjxxxx vport-mode manual tcont 1 name internet profile UNLIMITED_UP gemport 1 name internet tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 10 2.2********************Voice************************ tcont 2 name voip profile voip gemport 2 name voip tcont 2 vport-map 1 2 vlan 20 $ 3********************Interface vport(ทำงานฝั่ง OLT)************************ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 10 vlan 3097 ********************Voice************************ service-port 2 user-vlan 20 vlan 1500 $ 4********************pon-onu-mng(ทำงานฝั่ง ONU)************************ 4.1********************Bridge************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service internet gemport 1 vlan 10 vlan port eth_0/1 mode tag vlan 10 dhcp-ip ethuni eth_0/1 from-internet $ 4.2********************Route************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service internet gemport 1 vlan 10 wan-ip 1 ipv4 mode pppoe username xxxxjxxxx@fttxhome password xxxxxxxx vlan-profile internet host 1 wan-ip ipv4 ping-response enable traceroute-response enable $ 4.3********************Voice************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service voice gemport 2 vlan 20 voip protocol sip voip-ip ipv4 mode dhcp vlan-profile voip host 2 voip-ip ipv4 ping-response enable traceroute-response enable sip-service pots_0/1 profile sipp41 userid 0xxxxxxxx username 0xxxxxxxx password 0xxxxxxxx display-name 0xxxxxxxx sip-service pots_0/2 profile sipp41 userid 0xxxxxxxx username 0xxxxxxxx password 0xxxxxxxx display-name 0xxxxxxxx $ 4.4********************VPN Route************************ (config)#gpon (config-gpon)#onu profile ip pe-wan-vlan303 ipv4 gateway 10.6.3.253 (config-gpon)#onu profile vlan vlan303 tag-mode tag cvlan 303 $ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name 7742x0001 PEA vport-mode manual tcont 1 name vpn profile VPN-30M-IN gemport 1 name vpn tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 303 $ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 303 vlan 303 $ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service vpn gemport 1 vlan 303 wan-ip 1 ipv4 mode static ip-profile pe-wan-vlan303 ip-address 10.6.3.254 mask 255.255.255.252 vlan-profile vlan303 host 1 $ 4.5********************Bridge Trunk************************ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name xxxxjxxxx vport-mode manual tcont 1 name internet profile UNLIMITED_UP gemport 1 name internet tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 28 vport-map 1 1 vlan 350 vport-map 1 1 vlan 352 $ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 28 vlan 28 service-port 2 user-vlan 10 vlan 350 service-port 3 user-vlan 30 vlan 352 $ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service mng gemport 1 vlan 28 service vpn gemport 1 vlan 10 service vpn1 gemport 1 vlan 30 vlan port eth_0/1 mode trunk vlan port eth_0/1 vlan 28,10,30 dhcp-ip ethuni eth_0/1 from-internet ### หลังจาก static IP WAN ลงไปที่ ONU ให้ไปปิด NAT ที่เมนู Network => Routing(IPv4) => NAT โดยเอาเครื่องหมายถูกออก 5********************Create ONU Type ONU)************************ pon onu-type ZTE-F220 gpon description 4GE,2POTS onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 pots_0/2 onu-type ZTE-F260A gpon description 1XGE,4GE,2POTS,WIFI onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A pots_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/6 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/7 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/8 onu-type ZTE-F2801S gpon description 1XGE onu-type-if ZTE-F2801S eth_0/1 onu-type ZTE-F2866S gpon description 1XGE,4GE,2POTS,WIFI onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S pots_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/6 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/7 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/8 onu-type ZTE-ESPORT gpon description 4GE,2POTS,WIFI max-iphost 4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/5 Config ZTE OLT C6xx |  |  | 
เขียนโดย Meru^^
วันพุธที่ 22 ธันวาคม  2021 เวลา 12:36 น.
1.##################Add Profile และ register onu C6XX################### 1.1********************การ Add profile upload ******************** gpon profile tcont UNLIMITED_UP type 4 maximum 1228800 profile tcont voip type 1 fixed 1536 profile tcont UNLIMITED_UP_Type3 type 3 assured 10240 maximum 819200 onu profile sip sipp42 registrar sipp42.totbb.net profile tcont VPN-10M-IN type 1 fixed 10240 profile tcont VPN-30M-IN type 1 fixed 36860 ! 1.2********************การ Add VLAN profile******************** gpon onu profile sip sipp41 proxy sipp41.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp41 registrar sipp41.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp42 proxy sipp42.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp42 registrar sipp42.totbb.net onu profile vlan internet tag-mode tag cvlan 10 onu profile vlan voip tag-mode tag cvlan 20 pri 7 ! ################### การ Register ONU ######################## 1.************************register onu C6XX************************ # show pon onu uncfg conf t (config)# interface gpon_olt-1/2/1 (config)# (config-if-gpon_olt-1/2/1)# onu 1 type ZTE-F680 sn ZTEG090009E2 vport-mode manual ! 2.********************Interface gpon(ทำงานฝั่ง OLT)************************ 2.1********************Internet************************ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name xxxxjxxxx vport-mode manual tcont 1 name internet profile UNLIMITED_UP gemport 1 name internet tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 10 2.2********************Voice************************ tcont 2 name voip profile voip gemport 2 name voip tcont 2 vport-map 1 2 vlan 20 $ 3********************Interface vport(ทำงานฝั่ง OLT)************************ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 10 vlan 3097 ********************Voice************************ service-port 2 user-vlan 20 vlan 1500 $ 4********************pon-onu-mng(ทำงานฝั่ง ONU)************************ 4.1********************Bridge************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service internet gemport 1 vlan 10 vlan port eth_0/1 mode tag vlan 10 dhcp-ip ethuni eth_0/1 from-internet $ 4.2********************Route************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service internet gemport 1 vlan 10 wan-ip 1 ipv4 mode pppoe username xxxxjxxxx@fttxhome password xxxxxxxx vlan-profile internet host 1 wan-ip ipv4 ping-response enable traceroute-response enable $ 4.3********************Voice************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service voice gemport 2 vlan 20 voip protocol sip voip-ip ipv4 mode dhcp vlan-profile voip host 2 voip-ip ipv4 ping-response enable traceroute-response enable sip-service pots_0/1 profile sipp41 userid 0xxxxxxxx username 0xxxxxxxx password 0xxxxxxxx display-name 0xxxxxxxx sip-service pots_0/2 profile sipp41 userid 0xxxxxxxx username 0xxxxxxxx password 0xxxxxxxx display-name 0xxxxxxxx $ 4.4********************VPN Route************************ (config)#gpon (config-gpon)#onu profile ip pe-wan-vlan303 ipv4 gateway 10.6.3.253 (config-gpon)#onu profile vlan vlan303 tag-mode tag cvlan 303 $ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name 7742x0001 PEA vport-mode manual tcont 1 name vpn profile VPN-30M-IN gemport 1 name vpn tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 303 $ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 303 vlan 303 $ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service vpn gemport 1 vlan 303 wan-ip 1 ipv4 mode static ip-profile pe-wan-vlan303 ip-address 10.6.3.254 mask 255.255.255.252 vlan-profile vlan303 host 1 $ 4.5********************Bridge Trunk************************ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name xxxxjxxxx vport-mode manual tcont 1 name internet profile UNLIMITED_UP gemport 1 name internet tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 28 vport-map 1 1 vlan 350 vport-map 1 1 vlan 352 $ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 28 vlan 28 service-port 2 user-vlan 10 vlan 350 service-port 3 user-vlan 30 vlan 352 $ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service mng gemport 1 vlan 28 service vpn gemport 1 vlan 10 service vpn1 gemport 1 vlan 30 vlan port eth_0/1 mode trunk vlan port eth_0/1 vlan 28,10,30 dhcp-ip ethuni eth_0/1 from-internet ### หลังจาก static IP WAN ลงไปที่ ONU ให้ไปปิด NAT ที่เมนู Network => Routing(IPv4) => NAT โดยเอาเครื่องหมายถูกออก 5********************Create ONU Type ONU)************************ pon onu-type ZTE-F220 gpon description 4GE,2POTS onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 pots_0/2 onu-type ZTE-F260A gpon description 1XGE,4GE,2POTS,WIFI onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A pots_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/6 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/7 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/8 onu-type ZTE-F2801S gpon description 1XGE onu-type-if ZTE-F2801S eth_0/1 onu-type ZTE-F2866S gpon description 1XGE,4GE,2POTS,WIFI onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S pots_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/6 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/7 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/8 onu-type ZTE-ESPORT gpon description 4GE,2POTS,WIFI max-iphost 4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/6 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/7 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/8 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT pots_0/2
แก้ไขล่าสุด ใน  วันพุธที่ 07 กันยายน  2022 เวลา 13:47 น.

Config ZTE OLT C6xx |  |  | 

เขียนโดย Meru^^
วันพุธที่ 22 ธันวาคม  2021 เวลา 12:36 น.
1.##################Add Profile และ register onu C6XX################### 1.1********************การ Add profile upload ******************** gpon profile tcont UNLIMITED_UP type 4 maximum 1228800 profile tcont voip type 1 fixed 1536 profile tcont UNLIMITED_UP_Type3 type 3 assured 10240 maximum 819200 onu profile sip sipp42 registrar sipp42.totbb.net profile tcont VPN-10M-IN type 1 fixed 10240 profile tcont VPN-30M-IN type 1 fixed 36860 ! 1.2********************การ Add VLAN profile******************** gpon onu profile sip sipp41 proxy sipp41.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp41 registrar sipp41.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp42 proxy sipp42.totbb.net onu profile sip sipp42 registrar sipp42.totbb.net onu profile vlan internet tag-mode tag cvlan 10 onu profile vlan voip tag-mode tag cvlan 20 pri 7 ! ################### การ Register ONU ######################## 1.************************register onu C6XX************************ # show pon onu uncfg conf t (config)# interface gpon_olt-1/2/1 (config)# (config-if-gpon_olt-1/2/1)# onu 1 type ZTE-F680 sn ZTEG090009E2 vport-mode manual ! 2.********************Interface gpon(ทำงานฝั่ง OLT)************************ 2.1********************Internet************************ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name xxxxjxxxx vport-mode manual tcont 1 name internet profile UNLIMITED_UP gemport 1 name internet tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 10 2.2********************Voice************************ tcont 2 name voip profile voip gemport 2 name voip tcont 2 vport-map 1 2 vlan 20 $ 3********************Interface vport(ทำงานฝั่ง OLT)************************ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 10 vlan 3097 ********************Voice************************ service-port 2 user-vlan 20 vlan 1500 $ 4********************pon-onu-mng(ทำงานฝั่ง ONU)************************ 4.1********************Bridge************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service internet gemport 1 vlan 10 vlan port eth_0/1 mode tag vlan 10 dhcp-ip ethuni eth_0/1 from-internet $ 4.2********************Route************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service internet gemport 1 vlan 10 wan-ip 1 ipv4 mode pppoe username xxxxjxxxx@fttxhome password xxxxxxxx vlan-profile internet host 1 wan-ip ipv4 ping-response enable traceroute-response enable $ 4.3********************Voice************************ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service voice gemport 2 vlan 20 voip protocol sip voip-ip ipv4 mode dhcp vlan-profile voip host 2 voip-ip ipv4 ping-response enable traceroute-response enable sip-service pots_0/1 profile sipp41 userid 0xxxxxxxx username 0xxxxxxxx password 0xxxxxxxx display-name 0xxxxxxxx sip-service pots_0/2 profile sipp41 userid 0xxxxxxxx username 0xxxxxxxx password 0xxxxxxxx display-name 0xxxxxxxx $ 4.4********************VPN Route************************ (config)#gpon (config-gpon)#onu profile ip pe-wan-vlan303 ipv4 gateway 10.6.3.253 (config-gpon)#onu profile vlan vlan303 tag-mode tag cvlan 303 $ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name 7742x0001 PEA vport-mode manual tcont 1 name vpn profile VPN-30M-IN gemport 1 name vpn tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 303 $ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 303 vlan 303 $ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service vpn gemport 1 vlan 303 wan-ip 1 ipv4 mode static ip-profile pe-wan-vlan303 ip-address 10.6.3.254 mask 255.255.255.252 vlan-profile vlan303 host 1 $ 4.5********************Bridge Trunk************************ interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 name xxxxjxxxx vport-mode manual tcont 1 name internet profile UNLIMITED_UP gemport 1 name internet tcont 1 vport 1 map-type vlan vport-map 1 1 vlan 28 vport-map 1 1 vlan 350 vport-map 1 1 vlan 352 $ interface vport-1/1/1.1:1 service-port 1 user-vlan 28 vlan 28 service-port 2 user-vlan 10 vlan 350 service-port 3 user-vlan 30 vlan 352 $ pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1 service mng gemport 1 vlan 28 service vpn gemport 1 vlan 10 service vpn1 gemport 1 vlan 30 vlan port eth_0/1 mode trunk vlan port eth_0/1 vlan 28,10,30 dhcp-ip ethuni eth_0/1 from-internet ### หลังจาก static IP WAN ลงไปที่ ONU ให้ไปปิด NAT ที่เมนู Network => Routing(IPv4) => NAT โดยเอาเครื่องหมายถูกออก 5********************Create ONU Type ONU)************************ pon onu-type ZTE-F220 gpon description 4GE,2POTS onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F220 pots_0/2 onu-type ZTE-F260A gpon description 1XGE,4GE,2POTS,WIFI onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A pots_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/6 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/7 onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/8 onu-type ZTE-F2801S gpon description 1XGE onu-type-if ZTE-F2801S eth_0/1 onu-type ZTE-F2866S gpon description 1XGE,4GE,2POTS,WIFI onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S pots_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S pots_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/5 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/6 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/7 onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/8 onu-type ZTE-ESPORT gpon description 4GE,2POTS,WIFI max-iphost 4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/3 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/4 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/1 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/2 onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT Config ZTE OLT C6xx
เขียนโดย Meru^^
วันพุธที่ 22 ธันวาคม  2021 เวลา 12:36 น.
1.##################Add Profile และ register onu C6XX###################
1.1********************การ Add profile upload ********************
gpon
profile tcont UNLIMITED_UP type 4 maximum 1228800
profile tcont voip type 1 fixed 1536
profile tcont UNLIMITED_UP_Type3 type 3 assured 10240 maximum 819200
onu profile sip sipp42 registrar sipp42.totbb.net
profile tcont VPN-10M-IN type 1 fixed 10240
profile tcont VPN-30M-IN type 1 fixed 36860
!
1.2********************การ Add VLAN profile********************
gpon
onu profile sip sipp41 proxy sipp41.totbb.net
onu profile sip sipp41 registrar sipp41.totbb.net
onu profile sip sipp42 proxy sipp42.totbb.net
onu profile sip sipp42 registrar sipp42.totbb.net
onu profile vlan internet tag-mode tag cvlan 10
onu profile vlan voip tag-mode tag cvlan 20 pri 7
!
################### การ Register ONU ########################
1.************************register onu C6XX************************
# show pon onu uncfg
conf t
(config)# interface gpon_olt-1/2/1
(config)# (config-if-gpon_olt-1/2/1)# onu 1 type ZTE-F680 sn ZTEG090009E2 vport-mode manual
!
2.********************Interface gpon(ทำงานฝั่ง OLT)************************
2.1********************Internet************************
interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1
name xxxxjxxxx
vport-mode manual
tcont 1 name internet profile UNLIMITED_UP
gemport 1 name internet tcont 1
vport 1 map-type vlan
vport-map 1 1 vlan 10
2.2********************Voice************************
tcont 2 name voip profile voip
gemport 2 name voip tcont 2
vport-map 1 2 vlan 20
$
3********************Interface vport(ทำงานฝั่ง OLT)************************
interface vport-1/1/1.1:1
service-port 1 user-vlan 10 vlan 3097
********************Voice************************
service-port 2 user-vlan 20 vlan 1500
$
4********************pon-onu-mng(ทำงานฝั่ง ONU)************************
4.1********************Bridge************************
pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1
service internet gemport 1 vlan 10
vlan port eth_0/1 mode tag vlan 10
dhcp-ip ethuni eth_0/1 from-internet
$
4.2********************Route************************
pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1
service internet gemport 1 vlan 10
wan-ip 1 ipv4 mode pppoe username xxxxjxxxx@fttxhome password xxxxxxxx vlan-profile internet host 1
wan-ip ipv4 ping-response enable traceroute-response enable
$
4.3********************Voice************************
pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1
service voice gemport 2 vlan 20
voip protocol sip
voip-ip ipv4 mode dhcp vlan-profile voip host 2
voip-ip ipv4 ping-response enable traceroute-response enable
sip-service pots_0/1 profile sipp41 userid 0xxxxxxxx username 0xxxxxxxx password 0xxxxxxxx display-name 0xxxxxxxx
sip-service pots_0/2 profile sipp41 userid 0xxxxxxxx username 0xxxxxxxx password 0xxxxxxxx display-name 0xxxxxxxx
$
4.4********************VPN Route************************
(config)#gpon
(config-gpon)#onu profile ip pe-wan-vlan303 ipv4 gateway 10.6.3.253
(config-gpon)#onu profile vlan vlan303 tag-mode tag cvlan 303
$
interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1
name 7742x0001 PEA
vport-mode manual
tcont 1 name vpn profile VPN-30M-IN
gemport 1 name vpn tcont 1
vport 1 map-type vlan
vport-map 1 1 vlan 303
$
interface vport-1/1/1.1:1
service-port 1 user-vlan 303 vlan 303
$
pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1
service vpn gemport 1 vlan 303
wan-ip 1 ipv4 mode static ip-profile pe-wan-vlan303 ip-address 10.6.3.254 mask 255.255.255.252 vlan-profile vlan303 host 1
$
4.5********************Bridge Trunk************************
interface gpon_onu-1/1/1:1
name xxxxjxxxx
vport-mode manual
tcont 1 name internet profile UNLIMITED_UP
gemport 1 name internet tcont 1
vport 1 map-type vlan
vport-map 1 1 vlan 28
vport-map 1 1 vlan 350
vport-map 1 1 vlan 352
$
interface vport-1/1/1.1:1
service-port 1 user-vlan 28 vlan 28
service-port 2 user-vlan 10 vlan 350
service-port 3 user-vlan 30 vlan 352
$
pon-onu-mng gpon_onu-1/1/1:1
service mng gemport 1 vlan 28
service vpn gemport 1 vlan 10
service vpn1 gemport 1 vlan 30
vlan port eth_0/1 mode trunk
vlan port eth_0/1 vlan 28,10,30
dhcp-ip ethuni eth_0/1 from-internet
### หลังจาก static IP WAN ลงไปที่ ONU ให้ไปปิด NAT ที่เมนู Network => Routing(IPv4) => NAT โดยเอาเครื่องหมายถูกออก
5********************Create ONU Type ONU)************************
pon
onu-type ZTE-F220 gpon description 4GE,2POTS
onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/2
onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/3
onu-type-if ZTE-F220 eth_0/4
onu-type-if ZTE-F220 pots_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-F220 pots_0/2
onu-type ZTE-F260A gpon description 1XGE,4GE,2POTS,WIFI
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/2
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/3
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/4
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A eth_0/5
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A pots_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A pots_0/2
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/2
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/3
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/4
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/5
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/6
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/7
onu-type-if ZTE-F260A wifi_0/8
onu-type ZTE-F2801S gpon description 1XGE
onu-type-if ZTE-F2801S eth_0/1
onu-type ZTE-F2866S gpon description 1XGE,4GE,2POTS,WIFI
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/2
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/3
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/4
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S eth_0/5
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S pots_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S pots_0/2
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/2
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/3
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/4
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/5
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/6
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/7
onu-type-if ZTE-F2866S wifi_0/8
onu-type ZTE-ESPORT gpon description 4GE,2POTS,WIFI max-iphost 4
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/2
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/3
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT eth_0/4
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/2
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/3
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/4
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/5
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/6
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/7
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT wifi_0/8
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT pots_0/1
onu-type-if ZTE-ESPORT pots_0/2
